# Summary

<!-- What changed and why -->

## Docs updated (part of "done")

If code, schema/interface, infra/env, a decision, or a gotcha changed, the knowledge pack and README must change too. Tick what applies:

- [ ] `knowledge-pack/DATA_CONTRACT.md` (data or interface change)
- [ ] `knowledge-pack/ROADMAP.md` (new feature or priority shift)
- [ ] `knowledge-pack/DECISIONS_AND_GOTCHAS.md` (a decision or a pitfall)
- [ ] `knowledge-pack/TECH_STACK.md` (stack / infra / env change)
- [ ] `README.md`
- [ ] Applied the same edit to **both** pack copies (repo + OneDrive hub)
- [ ] No docs change needed (explain why): ______

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` passes
- [ ] Affected flow verified in `bun run dev`
- [ ] No force-push / history rewrite (Lovable sync)
